seo.title: FSD Architecture
seo.description: Feature-Sliced Design architecture rules, layer boundaries, and dependency guidelines for scalable frontend projects

header.title: Feature-Sliced Design Rules
header.description: Establishing a strict hierarchy of layers and dependency boundaries to ensure <one>horizontal</one> and <one>vertical</one> decoupling.

benefit_text: The <one>FSD</one> methodology allows creating scalable and predictable applications by dividing code into functional layers with clear isolation of responsibility.

hierarchy.title: Mental Hierarchy
hierarchy.description: Dependency flow is always downward: upper layers use lower ones, but <one>never vice versa</one>.

boundaries.title: Dependency Boundaries
boundaries.description: Each layer has <one>clearly defined</one> import permissions.

entities.title: Standard Entity Structure
entities.description: Each entity is a self-contained module. We use strict subfolder separation for predictability and maintainability.

widgets.title: Widget: Model & UI Separation
widgets.description: Widgets are "smart" blocks. We separate logic (<one>model</one>) from the visual part (<one>ui</one>) to simplify testing and refactoring.
widgets.importance_description: The <one>model/</one> folder contains everything that makes the widget functional (Zod schemas, form configs, local types). The <one>ui/</one> folder contains only display components.
